title.en: Additive manufacturing - General principles - Fundamentals and vocabulary
title.zh: 增材制造 - 总则 - 基础和术语

standards.abstract: Establishes and defines terms used in additive manufacturing (AM) technology. Provides fundamental terminology for all AM processes applicable to medical devices. Edition 2.
standards.scope: Fundamental terminology and principles for additive manufacturing of medical devices.

title.en: Additive manufacturing - Design - Requirements, guidelines and recommendations
title.zh: 增材制造 - 设计 - 要求、指南和建议

standards.abstract: Provides requirements, guidelines and recommendations for using additive manufacturing in product design. Applicable to design of 3D-printed medical devices and patient-matched implants.
standards.scope: Design requirements for additively manufactured products (medical implants, surgical guides).

title.en: Additive manufacturing - Qualification principles - Requirements for industrial additive manufacturing processes and production sites
title.zh: 增材制造 - 资格鉴定原则 - 工业增材制造过程和生产场所的要求

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for qualification of industrial AM processes and production sites. Critical for quality assurance of 3D-printed medical devices in production environments. Edition 1.
standards.scope: Process and site qualification for additive manufacturing of medical devices.

title.en: Standard for Additive Manufacturing - Post Processing Methods - Standard Specification for Thermal Post-Processing Metal Parts Made Via Powder Bed Fusion
title.zh: 增材制造 - 后处理方法 - 粉末床熔融金属零件热后处理的标准规范

standards.abstract: Covers thermal post-processing requirements for metal parts made via powder bed fusion. Directly applicable to 3D-printed titanium and cobalt-chrome medical implants.
standards.scope: Thermal post-processing of powder bed fusion metal parts for medical implants.

title.en: Additive manufacturing - Design - Part 1: Laser-based powder bed fusion of metals
title.zh: 增材制造 - 设计 - 第1部分：金属激光粉末床熔融

standards.abstract: Provides design recommendations for parts manufactured using laser-based powder bed fusion of metals (L-PBF). Most common AM process for medical device production (titanium, stainless steel).
standards.scope: Design for laser powder bed fusion of metal medical devices (implants, instruments).
